prompt: Recreate the exact composition and pose of the reference image with the Sagrada Família centered in the background. Replace the subject with my exact face, hairstyle, beard, and facial features from the reference images. Wear a fitted white crew-neck T-shirt, cream cargo pants, and white sneakers. Maintain the same standing pose, body proportions, camera angle, dramatic cloud-filled sky, natural daylight, cinematic realism, ultra-detailed, photorealistic, 8K, high sharpness, symmetrical composition, --ar 4:5.
promptEn: Recreate the exact composition and pose of the reference image with the Sagrada Família centered in the background. Replace the subject with my exact face, hairstyle, beard, and facial features from the reference images. Wear a fitted white crew-neck T-shirt, cream cargo pants, and white sneakers. Maintain the same standing pose, body proportions, camera angle, dramatic cloud-filled sky, natural daylight, cinematic realism, ultra-detailed, photorealistic, 8K, high sharpness, symmetrical composition, --ar 4:5.
promptZh: 重现参考图像的精确构图和姿势，背景中央为 圣家堂。将主体替换为参考图像中我本人的脸部、发型、胡须和面部特征。穿着 修身白色圆领 T 恤、米色工装裤和白色运动鞋。保持相同的站立姿势、身体比例、摄像机角度、戏剧性的多云天空、自然日光、电影级写实感、超精细、照片级真实、8K 分辨率、高清晰度、对称构图，--ar 4:5。
